title: FR - Delete dropdown or status labels via the API
excerpt: Right now, there are no API methods for deleting dropdown values or status labels. Having this would be helpful. Right now I’m attempting to get at this (for dropdown values) by creating a new column with a new set of dr…

posts.author: Tim.Hunt (Tim Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, there are no API methods for deleting dropdown values or status labels. Having this would be helpful. Right now I’m attempting to get at this (for dropdown values) by creating a new column with a new set of dropdown values/ labels, then copying over values from one column to another without allowing new labels to be created.

Not having to manually delete the default status labels on a board would also be helpful when trying to use an api to automate a workflow.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tim.Hunt!

Thank you for making this suggestion!

I’ll take this feedback to my team for their consideration.
